attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Spritzee
description: In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

name: Aromatisse
description: Its scent is so overpowering that, unless a Trainer happens to really enjoy the smell, he or she will have a hard time walking alongside it.

attacks.name: Heavy Perfume
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused. Put 6 damage counters instead of 3 on that Pokémon for this Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hug
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Xerneas
description: When the horns on its head shine in seven different colors, it is said to be sharing everlasting life.

attacks.name: Rainbow Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each different type of Pokémon on your Bench.

attacks.name: Power Creation
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon was healed during this turn, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Axew
description: They mark their territory by leaving gashes in trees with their tusks. If a tusk breaks, a new one grows in quickly.

name: Axew
description: They mark their territory by leaving gashes in trees with their tusks. If a tusk breaks, a new one grows in quickly.

name: Fraxure
description: A broken tusk will not grow back, so it diligently sharpens its tusks on river rocks after the end of a battle.

attacks.name: Dragon Slayer
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Dragon Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Haxorus
description: Their sturdy tusks will stay sharp even if used to cut steel beams. These Pokémon are covered in hard armor.

name: Noivern

name: Meowth
description: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: Doduo
description: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

name: Dodrio
description: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

name: Snorlax
description: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

name: Hoothoot

name: Noctowl

name: Teddiursa
description: Before food becomes scarce in wintertime, its habit is to hoard food in many hidden locations.

name: Ursaring
description: Although it has a large body, it is quite skilled at climbing trees. It eats and sleeps in the treetops.

effect: Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Houndoom-EX.

name: Parallel City
effect:
Choose which way this card faces before you play it. This ↓ player can't have more than 3 Benched Pokémon.(When this card comes into play, this ↓ player discards Benched Pokémon until he or she has 3 Pokémon on the Bench.)

Any damage done by attacks from this ↓ player's Grass, Fire, or Water Pokémon is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Burning Energy
effect:
This card can only be attached to Fire Pokémon. This card provides Fire Energy only while this card is attached to a Fire Pokémon.

If this card is discarded by an attack of the Fire Pokémon this card is attached to, attach this card from your discard pile to that Pokémon after attacking.

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Fire Pokémon, discard this card.)

name: Rainbow Energy
